319 I6200_ASTHMA_CD I6200_ASTHMA_CD I6200 Active Diagnoses: Asthma COPD Chronic Lung Disease Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of asthma, chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) or chronic lung disease (e.g., chronic bronchitits and restrictive lung diseases such as asbestosis) in the last seven days.
